headline: Britain's Ofwat board split over approval for Thames Water rescue deal, Bloomberg News reports
summary: The board of UK water regulator Ofwat is split over whether to approve a rescue deal offered by the creditors of Thames Water, Bloomberg News reported on Tuesday, citing a person familiar with the...

headline: BlackRock Stock Gains on Q1 Earnings Beat, Revenues & AUM Rise Y/Y
summary: BLK tops Q1 estimates as revenues jump 27% y/y and AUM climbs to $13.89T, but rising expenses affect gains despite strong inflows.
